title: Auudio
description: Library mod to easily play background sound in menus and worlds.
body:
## Dependencies ### Fabric - [Fabric API](https://modrinth.com/mod/fabric-api) (Only for Fabric) ## About **THIS MOD DOES NOTHING ON ITS OWN! IT'S A LIBRARY THAT OTHER MODS CAN USE TO DO THINGS WITH IT!** Auudio is a library mod to easily play background sounds in menus and worlds.
It aims on being as simple as possible, while still giving many options to control the audio. - No need to register sound assets - Support for using external sounds like audio files stored on the client system (by path) or web files (by URL) - Change the sound volume individually, without changing the volume of the sound channel - Full control over starting/stopping/pausing/un-pausing the sound individually, without the need to stop or pause all sounds For full documentation, check out the GitHub repo! ## Bug Reports and Requests You can report bugs and request features either on [GitHub](https://github.com/Keksuccino/Auudio/issues) or via [Discord](https://discord.gg/UzmeWkD)! ## Modpacks You can freely use this mod in modpacks. ## Special Thanks To my patrons: - Kreezxil - q!!! - Jolihan ## Copyright Auudio © Copyright 2022 Keksuccino.
Auudio is licensed under GPLv3. ## Server Needed? You need a Minecraft server to play with your friends but it's just too much work to setup one on your own?
No problem, just rent an ready-to-use server and start playing in a snap! Just click on the image below and use the code **keksuccino** to get **25% off** your first month!
